Default: ^Word is you wanted to leave the order, is that right?
^And you don't happen to be so stupid to have talked to the grand leader about this?
^No, It's not the way you think! I enjoy torture and rituals as much as every other cultist. It's just..
^I was trying to talk sense into him, but he wouldn't stop talking about leaving. It wouldn't have been long until someone noticed. I had to take action.
^He wouldn't have made it out there alone, you know? I had to go with him, protect him.
^I proposed to the grand leader to take him someplace save, somewhere with no contact to anyone. He would have the life he always dreamt of!
^I would have kept him save. While keep practicing the dark arts of course!
^And I suppose she reacted with kindness to your request?
^She killed him the next day. Desintegrated him where he stood. Didn't even give him the honor to be sacrificed.
^Damn, that really is cruel. And a very good motive to kill someone.
^The thought of revenge never crossed your mind?
^Of course not! I would never do anything to harm the order.
^No one is responsible for my brother's death but me.
